'''Deflector''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. He was put on a courier mission for the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] with [[Tracer (Rebel agent)|Tracer]] a few [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] after the [[Evacuation of Yavin]]. They were shot down over [[Trivar II/Legends|Trivar II]], with Deflector becoming critically wounded, and died in [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] custody in the city of [[Glare Peak]]. Tracer was then [[Rescue at Glare Peak|rescued]] by Rebel agents.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Deflector appears in ''[[Rescue at Glare Peak]]'', a special [[2014]] promotional adventure for [[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion (roleplaying game)|''Star Wars: Age of Rebellion'']] [[roleplaying game]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rescue at Glare Peak]]'' {{1st}}
